title: [ExportVerilog,i0 support] sv.passign with i0 is not commented out

features.name: always_ff block with passign to zero-width register
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a procedural non-blocking assignment to a zero-width register

features.name: zero-width register declaration
features.description: Code should include a zero-width wire or reg declaration used in always_ff context

features.name: zero-width procedural assignment in always_ff
features.description: Code should include a procedural assignment with zero-width source and target in an always_ff block
features.snippet: always_ff @(posedge clk) begin reg_zero <= in_zero; end
